editorial.tagline: An evening retreat on the Lower East Side
editorial.description: Operating since at least 2008 in the Lower East Side, Jadis attracts locals with its evening hours running from 5pm through late night on weekends. The bar's 4.6 rating from 405 reviews suggests a reliable neighborhood staple for casual evenings.
editorial.description_short: Jadis is a neighborhood bar on Rivington Street drawing locals with evening hours and a solid 4.6-star reputation. The space caters to those seeking a relaxed night out in the heart of the Lower East Side.
